questions.question: Explain the different types of Azure Storage services. Describe the use cases for Azure Blob Storage, Azure Files, and Azure Queue Storage.
keyPoints: Azure Blob Storage for unstructured data (blobs) like images, videos, and documents
Azure Files provides fully managed file shares accessible via SMB protocol
Azure Queue Storage enables asynchronous messaging between application components
Azure Disk Storage offers high-performance block storage for Azure VMs

questions.question: What is Azure Virtual Network? Explain the purpose of subnets, Network Security Groups (NSGs), and VPN Gateway in Azure networking architecture.
keyPoints: Azure Virtual Network enables Azure resources to communicate securely with each other and the internet
Subnets divide the virtual network into smaller network segments for better management and security
NSGs filter network traffic to and from Azure resources using security rules
VPN Gateway extends on-premises networks to Azure through secure encrypted connections

questions.question: Discuss the various database services offered by Azure. Compare Azure SQL Database and Azure Cosmos DB. Explain the security features available in Azure including Azure Active Directory, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), and encryption options.
keyPoints: Azure offers multiple database services: Azure SQL Database, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Database for MySQL/PostgreSQL, Azure SQL Managed Instance
Azure SQL Database is a fully managed relational database based on SQL Server, while Cosmos DB is a globally distributed NoSQL database service
Azure AD provides identity and access management with single sign-on and multi-factor authentication
Security features include RBAC for granular access control, Transparent Data Encryption (TDE), and Always Encrypted for protecting sensitive data

questions.question: Explain the concept of Serverless Computing in Azure using Azure Functions. Discuss how Azure DevOps supports CI/CD pipelines. Describe Azure AI services and machine learning capabilities available for building intelligent applications.
keyPoints: Azure Functions is an event-driven serverless compute platform that runs code without managing infrastructure, billed based on execution time
Azure DevOps provides CI/CD through Azure Pipelines with support for building, testing, and deploying applications to Azure
Azure AI services include Azure Cognitive Services (Vision, Speech, Language, Decision) and Azure Machine Learning for building ML models
Serverless offerings also include Azure Logic Apps for workflow automation and Azure Event Grid for event-driven architectures
